sentences.en: Wash your face, then come eat.
sentences.zh: 洗把臉，然後來吃飯。
sentences.ipa: /wɑʃ jʊɚ fes ðen kʌm it/

sentences.en: Let's say thank you for the meal.
sentences.zh: 我們來說謝謝這頓飯吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets se θæŋk ju fɔr ðə mil/

sentences.en: Give me a goodnight hug and kiss.
sentences.zh: 給我一個晚安擁抱和親親。
sentences.ipa: /ɡɪv mi ə ɡʊdˈnaɪt hʌɡ ənd kɪs/

sentences.en: Do you need to use the restroom before we go?
sentences.zh: 出發前你需要上廁所嗎？
sentences.ipa: /du ju nid tu juz ðə ˈrestrum bɪˈfɔr wi ɡo/

sentences.en: Watch your step on the sand.
sentences.zh: 走在沙地上要小心腳步。
sentences.ipa: /wɑtʃ jʊɚ step ɑn ðə sænd/

sentences.en: Line up quietly when the bell rings.
sentences.zh: 鐘聲響起時要安靜排隊。
sentences.ipa: /laɪn ʌp ˈkwaɪətli wen ðə bel rɪŋz/

sentences.en: Which subject do you like best?
sentences.zh: 你最喜歡哪一科？
sentences.ipa: /wɪtʃ ˈsʌbdʒɪkt du ju laɪk best/

sentences.en: Ask before you borrow someone's toy.
sentences.zh: 借別人的玩具前要先問過。
sentences.ipa: /æsk bɪˈfɔr ju ˈbɑro ˈsʌmwʌnz tɔɪ/

sentences.en: I understand why that made you angry.
sentences.zh: 我懂為什麼那件事讓你生氣。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ ˌʌndɚˈstænd waɪ ðæt med ju ˈæŋɡri/

sentences.en: I need you to listen the first time.
sentences.zh: 我需要你第一次就聽話。
sentences.ipa: /aɪ nid ju tu ˈlɪsən ðə fɝst taɪm/

sentences.en: You never gave up, I love that.
sentences.zh: 你從未放棄，我很欣賞這點。
sentences.ipa: /ju ˈnevɚ ɡev ʌp aɪ lʌv ðæt/

sentences.en: Keep your seatbelt on the whole ride.
sentences.zh: 整趟車程都要繫好安全帶。
sentences.ipa: /kip jʊɚ ˈsitbelt ɑn ðə hol raɪd/

sentences.en: Let's put a bandage on that scrape.
sentences.zh: 我們幫那個擦傷貼個OK繃吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets pʊt ə ˈbændɪdʒ ɑn ðæt skrep/

sentences.en: Everyone is so happy to see you.
sentences.zh: 大家看到你都好開心。
sentences.ipa: /ˈevriwʌn ɪz so ˈhæpi tu si ju/

sentences.en: Let's say goodbye to your friends now.
sentences.zh: 我們現在跟朋友們說再見吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets se ɡʊdˈbaɪ tu jʊɚ frendz naʊ/

sentences.en: Don't forget to greet people politely.
sentences.zh: 別忘了有禮貌地跟人打招呼。
sentences.ipa: /dont fɚˈɡet tu ɡrit ˈpipl pəˈlaɪtli/

sentences.en: Wear something warm, it's chilly this morning.
sentences.zh: 穿暖一點，今天早上有點冷。
sentences.ipa: /wer ˈsʌmθɪŋ wɔrm ɪts ˈtʃɪli ðɪs ˈmɔrnɪŋ/

sentences.en: You can play games after you finish reading.
sentences.zh: 讀完書之後可以玩遊戲。
sentences.ipa: /ju kæn ple ɡemz ˈæftɚ ju ˈfɪnɪʃ ˈridɪŋ/

sentences.en: This holiday is my favorite time of year.
sentences.zh: 這個節日是我一年中最喜歡的時候。
sentences.ipa: /ðɪs ˈhɑləde ɪz maɪ ˈfevɚɪt taɪm ʌv jɪr/

sentences.en: This is one of my favorite stories too.
sentences.zh: 這也是我最喜歡的故事之一。
sentences.ipa: /ðɪs ɪz wʌn ʌv maɪ ˈfevɚɪt ˈstɔriz tu/
